response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with ~18 years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/DevOps infrastructure, MCP code generators), but the role is a Level II people-management position and the resume shows no formal people-management or organizational-change experience. Technical leadership is implied through staff-level titles, founding an open-source platform, and teaching/workshops, yet there is no evidence of conducting performance reviews, managing direct reports, or owning team roadmaps. Mobile exposure exists but is dated and light for a mobile-platform-ecosystem focus.
strengths: Deep, hands-on developer-tools experience: test runner (Trial), assertion library, CI/CD and DevOps infrastructure, MCP code generators
18+ years of broad software development across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No formal people-management experience; role requires 2+ years managing engineers
No demonstrated experience setting team priorities, performance expectations, or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform experience is limited and dated (iOS/Apple TV work ended in 2016)

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure expertise
